title: Oppo K14 5G India launch date announced: Check expected price, specs and more
summary: The Oppo K14 5G is set to launch in India on March 9 at 12 noon. The phone will come with a 7,000 mAh battery ad support for 45W of fast charging. The device could come in the sub- ₹25,000 price bracket.&nbsp;

title: ‘Not worth it’: OpenAI researcher questions Pentagon amid ‘Cancel ChatGPT’ trend
summary: An OpenAI researcher has expressed concerns about the company's recent deal to deploy AI tools for the US Department of Defense. The company has been facing backlash since it announced the partnership with Pentagon last week.

title: Nothing Phone 4a, 4a pro price and storage variants leaked ahead of launch: here's what to expect
summary: A new leak has suggested that the Nothing Phone 4a could come with a 1.5K OLED display, Snapdragon 7s Gen 4, and a 50MP camera. The phone could begin at a price of ₹31,999 while the &nbsp;4a Pro could start at ₹40,000.

title: iPhone 17e vs Galaxy S25 FE vs Pixel 10a: Specs, features, India pricing and more compared
summary: Apple launched the iPhone 17e with an A19 processor, priced under ₹70,000. Competing with Pixel 10a and Galaxy S25 FE, it features a 6.1-inch display, IP68 rating, and a single 48MP camera. The Pixel 10a offers better battery and price, while the S25 FE has a more versatile camera setup.

title: Apple Launch event 2026: iPhone 17e price starts at ₹64,990, upgrades base storage to 256 GB for budget buyers
summary: &nbsp;The device features the A19 chip and MagSafe support. Pre-orders begin Wednesday, with sales starting March 11, as Apple aims to attract new users amid rising memory chip prices.

title: Is Claude down? Hundreds of users report issues in Delhi, Mumbai, Ahmedabad; Anthropic reacts
summary: Claude, Anthropic's AI chatbot, experienced service disruptions on Monday, affecting cities like Delhi and Mumbai. Downdetector reported issues related to Claude.ai and login/logout paths, while Anthropic confirmed that the Claude API is functioning correctly.

title: Stop buying gaming laptops for trading: Your trading laptop must have these specs to handle trading software
summary: Professional trading requires single-core CPU speed and Thunderbolt 4, not gaming GPUs. This guide reveals the specs that eliminate chart lag and slippage, ensuring your hardware matches the market speed.

summary: Apple Launch LIVE Updates: Apple's big week of launches is all set to kick off from today. The company could unveil new MacBooks, iPads and the iPhone 17e this week.

title: SoftBank’s $30 billion OpenAI bet spurs S&P credit outlook cut
summary: The revised outlook follows SoftBank’s decision last month to deepen its investment in the ChatGPT maker after already injecting more than $30 billion into OpenAI and funding other artificial intelligence ventures.

title: Infosys, Intel expand strategic tie-up to accelerate enterprise AI adoption globally
summary: The collaboration integrates 'Infosys Topaz Fabric' -- a purpose-built agentic services suite -- with Intel's high-performance compute platforms, including Intel Xeon processors, Intel Gaudi AI accelerators, and Intel AI PCs, the company said in a regulatory filing.

title: Oxyzo enters fund management, launches performing credit fund
summary: Oxyzo Financial Services, the lending arm of OfBusiness, has launched Oxyzo Credit Fund I through Oxyzo Investment Manager. title: ChatGPT uninstalls surge 295% in US after OpenAI’s AI deal with Pentagon
summary: ChatGPT mobile app uninstalls in the US jumped 295% day-over-day after OpenAI’s Pentagon deal. Downloads fell 13% on Saturday and 5% on Sunday, while 1-star reviews surged. Rival Anthropic’s Claude saw download growth, topped US App Store rankings, and gained strongly across several countries.

title: Aman Gupta, founder of consumer electronics brand Boat, to launch new venture
summary: Aman Gupta announced a new venture, Offbeat Studios, after moving to a non-executive role at Boat. The company has deferred IPO plans amid auditor scrutiny. Warburg Pincus-backed Boat posted over Rs 60 crore net profit in 2024-25, while revenue slightly declined to Rs 3,098 crore.

title: Anthropic made pitch in drone swarm contest during Pentagon feud
summary: Anthropic submitted a proposal for a $100 million Pentagon prize to develop voice-controlled drone swarms, during negotiations with the Defense Department. Its Claude AI focused on coordinating drones under human oversight, avoiding autonomous targeting. Anthropic wasn’t selected, while SpaceX, xAI,

title: Paramount's $110 billion Warner Bros deal poised to win FCC backing: FT
summary: US ​Federal ​Communications Commission chair Brendan ​Carr told ​the FT in ​an interview at Mobile World Congress in Barcelona on ‌Monday that there had ​been "concerns ​raised ⁠in Washington about the concentration of power" arising from ​Warner Bros' previously agreed deal with Netflix.

title: OpenAI looked ‘opportunistic and sloppy’ in rushed deal with Pentagon, CEO Sam Altman admits
summary: Sam Altman said OpenAI rushed its Pentagon deal, which made the company appear “opportunistic and sloppy.” However, the CEO reassured that the contract has been amended and now forbids domestic surveillance and use by intelligence agencies without changes to the contract. title: Claude down: Second outage in 24 hours, affects users across regions
summary: Claude AI Outage: Anthropic’s Claude experienced its second outage in less than 24 hours. Over 4,000 US users and around 300 in India reported problems, mostly with Claude chat. The app and website were also affected. The company is investigating the issue.
